nasb.text: He divided his forces against them by night, he and his servants, and defeated them, and pursued them as far as Hobah, which is north of Damascus.

esv.text: And he divided his forces against them by night, he and his servants, and defeated them and pursued them to Hobah, north of Damascus.

cnv.text: 亞伯蘭和他的僕人趁夜分隊攻擊他們，結果擊敗了他們，又追趕他們直到大馬士革北面的何把，

ccb.text: 夜里，亚伯兰和他的随从分头出击，大败敌人，一直追杀到大马士革北面的何巴，

csbs.text: 他和他的仆人们在夜间兵分几路，击败敌人，又追赶他们，直到大马士革北面的赫巴。
